prompt: This document is to be published on the UK GOV.UK government website. It may apply to one or more of the nations of the UK (England, Wales, Scotland or Northern Island). State whether it applies to England and give a short explanation (less than 100 words) for your decision.
reason: This document specifically mentions the regulation and use of neonicotinoid pesticides in sugar beet crops, which is a matter relevant to agricultural policy in England. It details the commitments made by the UK government regarding pesticide use, and explicitly states that the approach is applicable to England only.
